productDisplayName: Baggit Women Voltage Gang Black Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 18 cm x 10 cm Crafted from genuine leatherette with overlays, a buckle detail and stitch detailing on the upper Printed branding on the back Zippered opening with one main compartment and a zippered separator Four card holders and a pocket on either side of the wallet Main zipper with a pull loop for ease of handling Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
